message:
fix(storage,search): remove dead BatchExt imports, contentless FTS5 compatibility fixes

Three related cleanup and compatibility changes:

1. Remove dead BatchExt imports (7 files):
   - Drop unused `use frankensqlite::compat::BatchExt` from
     analytics/query, analytics/validate, bookmarks, pages/analytics,
     pages/summary, search/query, ui/analytics_charts
   - BatchExt was inlined into Connection in the frankensqlite dependency

2. FTS5 contentless-safe deletion (indexer/mod.rs, tests/storage.rs):
   - Replace `DELETE FROM fts_messages` with
     `INSERT INTO fts_messages(fts_messages) VALUES('delete-all')`
   - Plain DELETE is not supported on contentless FTS5 tables and would
     error after the V14 schema migration

3. FTS5 re-registration on writer connections (storage/sqlite.rs):
   - Call conn.execute(FTS5_REGISTER_SQL) after opening FrankenSQLite
     writer connections — FrankenSQLite skips virtual-table entries
     (rootpage=0) during schema introspection, so FTS5 must be
     explicitly re-registered for INSERT operations to work

4. Cache eviction fairness (search/query.rs):
   - CacheShards::enforce_caps now evicts from the shard with the most
     entries instead of whichever shard HashMap iterates first,
     distributing evictions fairly across shards

5. Minor: tests/storage.rs uses fixed-size array instead of Vec

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
